text: AI is changing how we think about creativity. Today, AI can generate paintings, compose music, and even write poems or stories. Some people argue that this is not true creativity because machines only learn from human-made data. They don't have emotions or personal experiences. However, others believe AI can be a powerful tool for human artists. It can suggest new ideas, mix styles, or help overcome creative blocks. For example, a musician might use AI to find an unexpected melody. While AI can imitate creativity, it rarely creates something truly original without human guidance. In the end, human creativity involves intention, emotion, and meaning—things machines may never fully understand.
